title: API images/create added missing parameters platform, message, repo
body:
Signed-off-by: cdoern <cbdoer23@g.holycross.edu>

Added support for the query parameters platform, message, and repo. Also edited documentation and formatted the request string as binary in register_images.go. CreateImageFromSrc within pkg/api/handlers/compat/images.go has some issues with supporting platform due to imageEngine.Import/the ImageImportOptions struct not supporting a platform parameter. 

I will most likely open a separate issue to handle this as it deals more with our side rather than the docker API. You can see [here](https://github.com/docker/engine/blob/7c6a9484ee37b28fa314f716581bdb268cd78ce2/api/server/router/image/image_routes.go#L26) that Docker supports platform in both the fromSrc and fromImage requests.
